import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import toast from 'react-hot-toast'; import { studentService } from '../../services/api'; import { useAuth } from '../../context/AuthContext'; const DEPTS = [ 'Computer Science & Engineering','Electronics & Communication', 'Mechanical Engineering','Civil Engineering', 'Electrical Engineering','Information Technology','Master of Computer Applications', ]; const DEPT_ABBR = { 'Computer Science & Engineering': 'CSE', 'Electronics & Communication': 'ECE', 'Mechanical Engineering': 'ME', 'Civil Engineering': 'CE', 'Electrical Engineering': 'EE', 'Information Technology': 'IT', 'Master of Computer Applications': 'MCA' }; export default function StudentProfile() { const { updateUser } = useAuth(); const [form, setForm] = useState({ firstName:'',lastName:'',phone:'',gender:'',dateOfBirth:'', department:'',batchYear:'',cgpa:'',rollNumber:'', skills:'',linkedinUrl:'',coverNote:'', }); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false); const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false); const set = k => e => setForm(p => ({ ...p, [k]: e.target.value })); const getDeptAbbr = (dept) => { if (!dept) return '—'; return DEPT_ABBR[dept] || dept; }; useEffect(() => { studentService.getProfile().then(r => { const d = r.data; setForm({ firstName: d.firstName || '', lastName: d.lastName || '', phone: d.phone || '', gender: d.gender || '', dateOfBirth: d.dateOfBirth || '', department: d.department || '', batchYear: d.batchYear || '', cgpa: d.cgpa || '', rollNumber: d.rollNumber || '', skills: d.skills || '', linkedinUrl: d.linkedinUrl || '', coverNote: d.coverNote || '', }); }).finally(() => setLoading(false)); }, []); const handleSubmit = async e => { e.preventDefault(); setSaving(true); try { const { data } = await studentService.updateProfile(form); updateUser({ firstName: data.firstName, lastName: data.lastName }); toast.success('Profile updated successfully!'); setIsEditing(false); } catch { toast.error('Failed to save profile.'); } finally { setSaving(false); } }; if (loading) return (
); // ── READ-ONLY VIEW ────────────────────────────────────────── if (!isEditing) { return ( <>
My Profile
Your academic and personal information
Personal Information
{form.firstName || '—'}
{form.lastName || '—'}
{form.phone || '—'}
{form.gender || '—'}
{form.dateOfBirth || '—'}
Academic Details
{getDeptAbbr(form.department)}
{form.batchYear || '—'}
{form.cgpa || '—'}
{form.rollNumber || '—'}
{form.skills || '—'}
{form.linkedinUrl ? {form.linkedinUrl} : '—'}
Career Note
{form.coverNote || '—'}
); } // ── EDIT MODE ────────────────────────────────────────────── return ( <>
Edit Profile
Update your academic and personal information
Personal Information
Academic Details
Career Note
